name: scoutpass
description: Local-first football scouting with Pears, QVAC and WDK

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.test:pear-worker: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run test:pear-worker --workspace backend
scripts.token:deploy:sepolia: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run token:deploy --workspace backend --
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.qvac:report: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run qvac:report --workspace backend
scripts.wallet:player: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run wallet:show --workspace backend -- player
scripts.wallet:scout: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run wallet:show --workspace backend -- scout
